tasks.title: Add Ukrainian-first i18n catalogues and deterministic footer jokes
tasks.dod: Vitest covers uk/en lookup fallback and joke rotation; no runtime i18n library imported

tasks.title: Implement comfort scoring and weekend highlight in framework-free lib
tasks.dod: Vitest proves score 0–100, badge colors at 70/40 thresholds, rationale ≤80 chars without emoji or !, and Sat–Sun pair uses location timezone including in-progress weekend

tasks.title: Encode and decode active location in URL query state
tasks.dod: Vitest round-trips lat/lon/name through encode/decode; pins and compare flags are excluded from shareable query

tasks.title: Build server-only Open-Meteo geocode and forecast client wrappers
tasks.dod: Vitest with mocked fetch maps Open-Meteo payloads to internal DTOs; module has no next/react imports

tasks.title: Expose geocode suggestions and reverse-geocode BFF routes with shared errors
tasks.dod: Route handlers match openapi.yaml; contract tests or handler tests cover 200 empty list, 503 provider_unavailable, and 422 reverse_failed; lib/errors codes align with OpenAPI

tasks.title: Expose forecast BFF route with comfort scores and weekend highlight
tasks.dod: GET /api/v1/forecast returns ForecastBundle per OpenAPI; handler tests cover happy path and 503 provider_unavailable

tasks.title: Expose weekend-compare BFF route for two or three pinned cities
tasks.dod: POST /api/v1/forecast/weekend-compare returns side-by-side Sat/Sun metrics; handler test covers 2–3 locations and 400 on fewer than two

tasks.title: Add shadcn Input, Card, and Skeleton primitives
tasks.dod: components/ui/input.tsx, card.tsx, skeleton.tsx import cleanly; Skeleton matches forecast card footprint used in loading states

tasks.title: Build responsive app shell, hero empty state, and footer credits
tasks.dod: Layout shows centred search hero with no default city; columns adapt at 768px and 1280px; footer links Open-Meteo and OSM and shows deterministic Ukrainian jokes

tasks.title: Implement debounced city search combobox with calm error states
tasks.dod: Debounced suggestions call BFF; zero-match shows inline Nothing found; provider outage shows distinct retry state; Enter selects lone suggestion

tasks.title: Render forecast day cards, weekend highlight, and loading skeleton
tasks.dod: Seven day cards show required fields and comfort badge; weekend headline uses mean Sat–Sun score; skeleton preserves layout while loading; location change clears in-memory cache

tasks.title: Add forty-eight-hour hourly temperature chart with sunrise and sunset
tasks.dod: Chart covers 48 hours from active location local hour; today's sunrise and sunset shown below per forecast payload

tasks.title: Load Leaflet map client-only with OSM tiles and reverse-geocode click
tasks.dod: Dynamic import with SSR skeleton; OSM attribution always visible; successful click sets location and marker; failure keeps prior location with inline retry

tasks.title: Wire URL query state and in-memory forecast cache to search and forecast
tasks.dod: Copied URL restores active location and forecast in fresh session; changing location discards prior forecast cache; pins not encoded in share link

tasks.title: Implement pin chips and weekend compare table with guardrails
tasks.dod: Up to three pin chips; compare disabled below two pins; fourth pin blocked with message; refresh clears pins; compare table shows Sat/Sun metrics and promote-to-active control

tasks.title: Add explicit opt-in geolocation control with permission-denied guidance
tasks.dod: No geolocation on first load; button triggers browser API then reverse-geocode flow; denial shows calm inline guidance without toast

tasks.title: Render condition-driven background, local clock, and reduced-motion fallback
tasks.dod: Animated background reflects condition and day/night from location astronomy; header shows local time; prefers-reduced-motion swaps to static gradient; outage shows calm retry not blank

tasks.title: Compose main page with responsive three-column layout and panel placement
tasks.dod: app/page.tsx places search, forecast, map, compare per SAD §1 breakpoints; npm run build succeeds; manual smoke confirms no auth gate on any MVP flow
